description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages prepare, build, install, package, using global variables IMAGE_REPOSITORY and IMAGE_VERSION to select Docker images and setting GIT_DEPTH to 1. In the prepare stage, the .prepare template (used by linux-prepare and mingw-x64-prepare) runs on $IMAGE_REPOSITORY/utilities-env:$IMAGE_VERSION, sets GIT_STRATEGY none, determines SOLARUS_REF from the branch or tag, downloads the SOLARUS_JOB artifact via wget, extracts it with 7za, and caches the ccache directory. In the build stage, the .build template (extended by linux-build, macos-build, and mingw-x64-build) exports ccache variables, runs $CMAKE_GEN_CMD -B build $CMAKE_GEN_FLAGS and $CMAKE_CMD --build build, caches ccache, and stores the build directory as a one‑week artifact; linux-build uses $IMAGE_REPOSITORY/linux-build-env:$IMAGE_VERSION, macos-build runs on macos-15-xcode-16 after installing brew packages and runs cmake --preset macos and cmake --build --preset macos, and mingw-x64-build uses $IMAGE_REPOSITORY/mingw-build-env:$IMAGE_VERSION with CMAKE_GEN_CMD set to x86_64-w64-mingw32-cmake and extra flags. The install stage uses the .install template (extended by mingw-x64-install) which runs $CMAKE_CMD --install build --strip and publishes the staging directory as a month‑long artifact. The package stage defines mingw-x64-package that runs on $IMAGE_REPOSITORY/mingw-build-env:$IMAGE_VERSION, computes PACKAGE name from tag or short SHA, executes mingw_make_pkg.sh with ARCH, PACKAGE, BASE_DIR, BINARIES, optionally adds extras and text files, copies luajit DLL, adds it to the zip, and uploads the resulting $PACKAGE_PREFIX-*.zip artifact for one month.
